debug_info.goal:
A : Type u_1
inst✝² : CommRing A
inst✝¹ : IsDomain A
inst✝ : @IsKrullDomain A inst✝² inst✝¹
⊢ IsIntegrallyClosed A

failed_attempts:
let K := FractionRing A
  have : IsIntegrallyClosed (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
    rw [← IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A]
    refine Subalgebra.isIntegrallyClosed_iInf fun p ↦ Subalgebra.isIntegrallyClosed_iInf fun hp ↦ ?_
    have := IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization p hp
    exact IsIntegrallyClosed.of_ringEquiv (Localization.subalgebraEquiv K _ _).symm
  exact IsIntegrallyClosed.of_ringEquiv (Algebra.botEquivOfInjective (IsFractionRing.injective A K)).symm
